{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/239602944?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/1seal/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/1seal/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/1seal/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/1seal/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/1seal", "id": 239602944, "login": "1seal", "node_id": "U_kgDODkgNAA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/1seal/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/1seal/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/1seal/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/1seal/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/1seal/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/1seal", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46539", "cvss": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-345", "name": "Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity"}], "description": "### Impact
A logic flaw in `BlockInclusionProof::is_block_proven` causes the function to return true without performing any cryptographic verification when `get_interlink_hops` yields an empty hop list. This occurs when the target block is at the election block position immediately preceding the election head's epoch. An attacker providing transaction inclusion proofs can forge a MacroBlock header for that epoch position and have it accepted as "proven" without any hash or signature verification.

### Patches
[The patch for this vulnerability](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/pull/3705) is formally released as part of [v1.4.0](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.4.0).

### Workarounds
No Workarounds

### Resources
See [PR](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/pull/3705).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0015, "percentile": 0.04535}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-799f-29jm-gr6c", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T19:38:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-799f-29jm-gr6c", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-799f-29jm-gr6c"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46539"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-10T00:16:54Z", "published_at": "2026-05-21T19:38:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security/advisories/GHSA-799f-29jm-gr6c", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/pull/3705", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/commit/cc5a1d54bbbffd1ea975bd2ee87d5f7b3b30bbf1", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.4.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46539", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-799f-29jm-gr6c"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security-advisories/GHSA-799f-29jm-gr6c", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross", "summary": "nimiq-primitives: BlockInclusionProof interlink issue when hops are empty", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-10T13:41:26Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-799f-29jm-gr6c", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "nimiq-primitives"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: nimiq-primitives: BlockInclusionProof interlink issue when hops are empty
